name: Safehold Inc.
description: Safehold Inc. is a real estate investment trust that specializes in modern ground leases. The company provides long-term, cost-efficient capital to commercial building owners and developers, allowing them to unlock the value of the land beneath their properties. By separating the ownership of the land from the building, Safehold helps owners improve their capital efficiency, enhance investment returns, and reduce risk. The company focuses on high-quality assets across various property types, including multifamily, office, hotel, and industrial, aiming to provide a more flexible and sustainable capital structure for the modern real estate market.
